acceptance_checks: APR blocks synthesis when required evidence is missing
failure_modes.false_assumption: A successful browser answer implies ChatGPT Pro Extended Reasoning or Gemini Deep Think was actually active.
mitigations: same-session highest-mode verification before prompt submission
browser lease coordinator prevents cross-run tab contamination
failure_modes.title: Browser automation succeeds in the wrong mode
failure_modes.user_harm: The user trusts a polished plan that did not use the required premium reasoning path.

acceptance_checks: remote doctor returns ready with heartbeat
recover command is included in failure envelopes
early_warning_signals: run retries collide in one profile
failure_modes.false_assumption: Remote browser behaves like a stateless API endpoint.
mitigations: remote-browser smoke tests before live fanout
single shared logical profile with provider-scoped locks
failure_modes.title: Remote browser is unreliable under real load
failure_modes.user_harm: Users wait for expensive runs that hang, duplicate prompts, or corrupt sessions.

acceptance_checks: balanced requires quorum but not every optional reviewer
failure_modes.false_assumption: Users will tolerate long/high-cost runs because quality is higher.
mitigations: optional reviewer quorum instead of all-reviewer blocking
failure_modes.title: Highest reasoning makes the system too slow or expensive
failure_modes.user_harm: The tool feels impressive but unusable.

acceptance_checks: each live route has doctor and one smoke fixture
failure_modes.false_assumption: Matching local schemas is enough to integrate independent agents.
failure_modes.title: Mocks pass but live cutover fails
failure_modes.user_harm: Three impressive components cannot run together.

acceptance_checks: first useful slice can run with mocks and one live browser provider
validators check required but not speculative features
early_warning_signals: implementers build generalized infrastructure instead of narrow primitives
failure_modes.title: The plan becomes too hard for coding agents to implement
failure_modes.user_harm: Development stalls or produces overbuilt, fragile architecture.

acceptance_checks: human review packet has executive summary and required decisions
early_warning_signals: users ask whether it is stuck
failure_modes.false_assumption: A comprehensive plan report is always better.
failure_modes.title: Users hate opaque waiting and giant reports
failure_modes.user_harm: Users abandon the workflow or distrust it.

acceptance_checks: docs snapshot must be fresh before live calls
failure_modes.false_assumption: A model matrix remains valid for months.
mitigations: max_browser_available instead of literal browser labels
failure_modes.title: Provider docs and model names drift faster than the bundle
failure_modes.user_harm: Runs fail or use lower-quality models than promised.

acceptance_checks: prompt compiler keeps search results in data context
traceability distinguishes source evidence from model opinion
early_warning_signals: DeepSeek overweights recent but irrelevant results
failure_modes.false_assumption: Search improves plan quality without increasing prompt-injection risk.
mitigations: search-derived claims marked as advisory unless verified
failure_modes.title: DeepSeek search introduces untrusted web noise
failure_modes.user_harm: The synthesized plan imports bad or adversarial web assumptions.

failure_modes.false_assumption: Redaction will happen naturally in implementation.
mitigations: unsafe artifacts quarantined and excluded from normal manifest
failure_modes.title: Evidence ledger leaks sensitive browser/account data

acceptance_checks: human review packet shows waivers prominently
failure_modes.false_assumption: A waiver mechanism will only be used carefully.
mitigations: non-waivable routes for balanced/audit formal first plan and synthesis
failure_modes.title: Waivers become silent downgrade loopholes
failure_modes.user_harm: The product silently violates its own quality promises.

acceptance_checks: contract changes update all three bundles
early_warning_signals: same schema has different hash across bundles
fixtures pass locally but fail end-to-end
one package adds fields that another treats as authoritative
failure_modes.title: Independent coding agents diverge on shared contracts
Prompt artifacts become too large and unfocused
failure_modes.user_harm: High-effort models spend reasoning on irrelevant context and produce worse plans.

summary: Premortem ledger for the v18 hardening pass: assume the workflow failed after six months and encode controls for the most likely causes.
